name: vertical-creator
description: Domain-knowledge primer for the marketing & creator vertical (creators, newsletter writers, podcasters, course sellers) so architect/pm don't spec naively against incumbents (Substack ~10%, Patreon 8–12%, Kajabi $149+, beehiiv, Buffer/Hootsuite/Later). Supplies the vocabulary, the non-obvious take-rate/red-ocean rules, the entities a real scheduler/analytics/monetization/sponsorship product must model, and the per-product wedge — with sponsorship-crm flagged as the white-space wedge. Applied by
author: avelikiy
